content.thinking:
The user wants to create a new local WordPress site called 'eval-test-onboard'. Let me think about what skill might apply here.

Looking at the available skills:
- `nexus-sites` - Discover and show all local and WP Engine sites with status. Use at the start of any workflow involving sites — always call this first before acting on a site.

The user wants to CREATE a new site, not just discover existing ones. Let me think about what tool/command to use for this.

Actually, looking at the constraints:
- The nexus CLI is at: node /Users/jeremy.pollock/development/wpengine/local-addon-nexus-ai/bin/nexus.js


- The instructions say "Skill instructions are already in your system prompt — use them directly, do NOT invoke the Skill tool"
- Also says "Do NOT use MCP tools"

For creating a new Local WordPress site, I need to use the nexus CLI directly. The command likely follows a pattern like `nexus sites create` with the site name as an argument.

Looking at the constraints again, I should use the full path to the nexus CLI at `/Users/jeremy.pollock/development/wpengine/local-addon-nexus-ai/bin/nexus.js`. Let me start by running a help command to see what options are available, or I could try the site creation command directly.

content.text: I'll check available site commands, then create the new site.

content.content:
Usage: nexus sites [options] [command]

Manage Local and WPE sites

Options:
  -h, --help                        display help for command

Commands:
  get [options] <target>            Get detailed information about a site
  clone <source> <newName>          Clone an existing site
  rename <target> <newName>         Rename a site
  export <target> [outputPath]      Export a site to archive
  import [options] <archivePath>    Import a site from archive
  logs [options] <target>           View site logs
  list [options]                    List all sites (local + WPE)
  create [options] <target>         Create a new local site
  start <target>                    Start a local site
  stop <target>                     Stop a local site
  restart <target>                  Restart a local site
  delete [options] <target>         Delete a local site
  config-php <target> <version>     Change PHP version
  config-ssl <target>               Trust SSL certificate
  config-xdebug [options] <target>  Toggle Xdebug
  status [options] <target>         Show what cached data exists for a site and
                                    how fresh it is
  refresh [options] <target>        Refresh the cached data (digital twin) for
                                    a site
  help [command]                    display help for command

content.content:
Usage: nexus sites create [options] <target>

Create a new local site

Options:
  --blueprint <name>  Create from Local blueprint
  --php <version>     PHP version (e.g., 8.2, 8.1, 7.4)
  --wp <version>      WordPress version (e.g., 6.4, 6.3)
  -h, --help          display help for command
